news.headline: Italian media reports US top diplomat Rubio to meet Pope Leo
news.summary:
Marco Rubio will travel to Rome this week for a visit reportedly aimed at easing strained relations with the Italyn government and the Holy See. Both Giorgia Meloni and Pope Leo XIV have faced criticism from Donald Trump, who has publicly attacked the pontiff’s anti-war remarks.

news.headline: Southern Lebanon: Israeli strikes kill one, wounds rescuers
news.summary:
Israel has carried out fresh air strikes in southern Lebanon. Officials there said at least one person was killed and four others were wounded.

news.headline: French interior minister vows crackdown on illegal raves after thousands gather at military site
news.summary: French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez vowed on Sunday to crack down on illegal raves as he visited the area in central France where a massive free party was held on a military base despite authorities' warnings about the risk of unexploded mortars. news.headline: Russian strikes on Ukraine kill three
news.summary: Ukraine and Russia exchanged cross-border drone strikes as the war continued. Across Ukraine, at least three people were killed in overnight Russian attacks. news.summary: The president seems unable to secure for Ukrainian people a gain that can compensate for a painful peace.
